## Summary

<!-- 1-2 sentences: what changed and why. Link the issue: closes #N -->

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code follows `CONTRIBUTING.md` conventions
- [ ] Godoc comments on every new exported symbol
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated; `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] Golden tests updated if codegen output changed (review diff)
- [ ] Lint passes (`golangci-lint run`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry generated by Conventional Commit (no manual edit)
- [ ] `STABILITY.md` updated if public API changed
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` updated if a new convention or pattern was added
- [ ] Doc page added or updated under `documentation/docs/` if user-facing
- [ ] Bench delta acceptable (only if perf-critical area touched, see #61)

## Type of change

<!-- check one -->
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] build / ci / chore — tooling
- [ ] rfc — design proposal

## Breaking change

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes — describe migration below

<!-- If yes:
Affected API:
Migration:
-->

## How tested

<!-- e.g.
- Added test in `packages/sveltego/core/codegen/each_test.go`
- Manually rendered playground, confirmed expected HTML output
-->
